## LibraryRuntime.LibraryRuntimeContext.fromLibrary() method

Creates a LibraryRuntimeContext wrapping an existing ChocolateLibrary. Use this when you already have a configured library instance.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static fromLibrary(library: ChocolateLibrary, preWarm?: boolean): Result<LibraryRuntimeContext>;
```
